productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Black Striped Shirt
description: CompositionDark green and black striped shirt with white accents, made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar, front buttoned placket, full length sleeves with buttoned cuffs, pocket on left chest and a curved hemline Wash careWash dark colours separatelyHand wash or machine wash cold using mild detergentDo not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeDo not iron on printStripes that add immense style to your casual look is what indigo nation brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal pants, denims or corduroys and black footwear for stylish formal and casual looks.Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 40
